creator: shoesoft@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 194923
patch fixing clan60 build

vdr-plugin-xineliboutput fails to build on 11.2-RELEASE.

The attached patch fixes the problem. Issues are also fixed upstream, but the current version requires a more recent version of multimedia/vdr than in ports.

Probably also fixes BROKEN_FreeBSD_12 but I don't have a system to test.
